# Implementation Status

## Implementations

| Implementation | Language | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| [mapvina-tile-spec/cpp](https://github.com/mapvina/mapvina-tile-spec/tree/main/cpp) | C++ | Decoder | Will be used by MapVina Native |
